recommendations.title: Cake
recommendations.overview: A travel writer improves her love life when she becomes an editor for her father's wedding magazine.

recommendations.title: The Hunters
recommendations.overview: Imagine if all mythical artifacts, from Jason's Golden Fleece to Cinderella's glass slippers, were real. Well, they are -- and for centuries, a secret society called the Hunters has been sworn to protect them from an evil force called the Krugen.

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: Miracles from Heaven

recommendations.title: Woman of the Year
recommendations.overview: Rival reporters Sam Craig and Tess Harding fall in love and get married, only to find their relationship strained when Sam comes to resent Tess' hectic lifestyle.
